title: Retouch
profTagline: Give a photo an instruction — "make it snowy", "remove the wires", "as an oil painting" — and AI rewrites the image. Your photo is uploaded to a free, keyless editing service only when you apply an edit.
primeReason: Take a photo, then edit it with a few words.
primePrivacy: Edited online — your photo is uploaded to the service
eRate: Too many requests — wait a moment
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
